zh.WORCESTERSHIRE: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM是father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON和MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾。他於1090年之前與Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1129年。

zh-hans.WORCESTERSHIRE: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM是father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON和MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON的儿子，出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾。他于1090年之前与Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1129年。

nameMeanings.name: VERDON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ramon, Angel, Luis, Ruben, Azael, Fernando, Fidel, Francisco, Guillermo, Javier.
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Verdon  .
Altered form of French   Verdun  .

variants.name: Ferdon
meanings: Altered form, under American Dutch influence in New Netherland, of French   Verdon  .

variants.name: Wearden
meanings: English (Lancashire): apparently from a placename with Old English denu ‘valley’ as the second element. However, the Victoria County History for Staffordshire identifies John de Werdon, mentioned in 1280, as having his name from Verdun (Manche, France); see Verdon .

variants.name: Verdun
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: VERDUM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

variants.name: Varden
meanings: English: variant of   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Randulph
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

variants.name: Radolph
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

variants.name: Radolf
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

variants.name: Rann
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

variants.name: Radulph
meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

meanings: Properly Radolph, the same as the German names Radulph, Radolf, Hroadolf, RudoIph; from Old German rad-ulph, help or counsel. The nickname is Rann.

meanings: From root of Randolph for Radolph.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Attainment’.

nameMeanings.name: COCTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from any of various places in England so called. The place name is of varied origin: in most cases it derives from the Old English personal name Cola, a byname for a swarthy person (from col ‘charcoal’) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, and so is a doublet of Colby .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Attainment’.

en.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM was born in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON and MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON. He married Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM before 1090, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1129.

fr.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM est né à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON et MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON. Il a épousé Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM avant 1090, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1129.

de.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM wurde in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON und MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON geboren. Er hat vor 1090 in England Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1129.

it.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM è nato il nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON e MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON. Lui sposato Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM prima del 1090, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1129.

ja.WORCESTERSHIRE: イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUMはイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでfather of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTONとMRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTONの息子として生まれた。1090年以前にイギリスでMrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUMと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1129年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON(와)과 MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1090년 이전 영국에서 Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1129년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM nasceu em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON e MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON. Ele casou-se com Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM antes 1090, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1129.

ru.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM родился в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON и MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM перед 1090 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1129 г.

es.lifeSummary: Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM nació en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON y MRS father of Abbot Waltier OF EVESHAM COCTON. Se casó con Mrs Randulph de COCTON de VERDON VERDUM antes de 1090, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1129.
